title: helichrysum microphyllum
intro: Helichrysum microphyllum, also known as the small-leaf everlast, is a perennial plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its small, woolly leaves and yellow or white flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine practices, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum microphyllum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating stress and anxiety, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum microphyllum include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
